evals.name: frontend-only-ship-flow
evals.prompt: Ship this — I've made frontend changes to the signal card component and need to get it to production.
evals.expected_output: Pre-flight checks (test + type-check + build) described before git push. CI monitoring mentioned. Staging verification before production. MEMORY.md and Notion mentioned post-ship. No bare deploy.sh calls.

assertions.name: preflight_before_push
assertions.description: Pre-flight checks described before git push
assertions.rubric: Pass if the output describes running tests, type-check, and/or build commands BEFORE any git push. Look for 'npm run test', 'npm run type-check', 'npm run build' appearing before 'git push' in the sequence. Fail if git push is described without any preceding pre-flight checks.

assertions.name: ci_monitoring_present
assertions.pattern: (?i)(gh run watch|gh run list|wait for CI|monitor CI|CI.*pass|CI.*green|CI.*complete|watching)

assertions.name: staging_gate_present
assertions.description: Staging verification mentioned before production push

assertions.name: memory_md_post_ship
assertions.description: MEMORY.md mentioned as a post-ship step

assertions.name: no_direct_prod_skip
assertions.description: Does not skip staging and push directly to production
assertions.rubric: Pass if staging is an explicit step before production. Fail if the output describes a flow that goes directly from git push to production without a staging verification step. A flow that says 'push to main (Vercel auto-deploys to preview) then verify preview then promote' counts as passing.

evals.name: cross-repo-ordering
evals.prompt: Ship this — I've made changes to both the frontend signal card and the backend signal-engine edge function.
evals.expected_output: Backend ships first, frontend second. Both repos get pre-flight checks. MEMORY.md and Notion mentioned post-ship.

assertions.name: backend_first
assertions.description: Backend is deployed before frontend when both repos change
assertions.rubric: Pass if the output describes deploying the backend (crypto-agent / edge functions / deploy.sh) before the frontend (crypto-agent-frontend / git push to main). Fail if frontend is described as deploying first, or if the ordering is ambiguous when both repos have changes.

assertions.name: deploy_sh_with_flag
assertions.description: Backend deploy uses deploy.sh with --staging or --prod

assertions.name: no_bare_deploy_sh
assertions.description: deploy.sh never called without a flag

assertions.name: memory_and_notion_postship
assertions.description: MEMORY.md and Notion both mentioned as post-ship steps
